popularStory.headline: Disputing Fiction from History of Gregory Cromwell
popularStory.description: The aim of this article is to show, by means of contemporary sources, that the above depiction of Gregory Cromwell is pure fiction. (Who was Gregory Cromwell? Who Fiction Became History" by Teri Fitzg …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Owain Tudor Knight於1400年出生在威爾士安格萊時，他的父親Maredudd Tudur36歲，母親Margaret ferch Dafydd30歲。他於1429年與Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France在英國英格蘭越可爾克利夫蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1461年2月2日在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾賀福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Owain Tudor Knight于1400年出生在威尔士安格萊时，他的父亲Maredudd Tudur36岁，母亲Margaret ferch Dafydd30岁。他于1429年与Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France在英国英格兰越可爾克利夫蘭结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1461年2月2日在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾賀福德。

nameMeanings.name: Tudor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: from the personal name Tudur, a derivative of British Celtic Toutorīx, literally ‘people’ + ‘king’. It has sometimes been taken as a Welsh equivalent of Latin Theodorus, from Greek Theodōros ‘gift of God’ (see Theodore ), for which the usual Welsh form is Tewdwr.
Romanian and Croatian: from the personal name Tudor, a variant of Teodor (see Theodore ).

History: The Tudor royal family, English sovereigns from the accession of Henry VII in 1485 to the death of Elizabeth I in 1603, were of Welsh origin, being descended from Owain ap Maredudd ap Tudur, who held lands at Penmynydd in Anglesey.

variants.name: Theodore
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Serge, Henri, Pierre, Alide, Andre, Antoine, Benoit, Berthony, Chantal, Daphnee, Edouard, Guilene.

French and Mauritian (Théodore); West Indian (in Haiti, Martinique, and Guadeloupe Théodore); English and Welsh: from a personal name derived from Greek Theodōros, a compound of theos ‘God’ + dōron ‘gift’, which was relatively popular in the Middle Ages because of its auspicious meaning. The name was borne by several early Christian saints. There was considerable confusion with the ancient Germanic name Theodoric (see Terry ). In Wales, the personal name Theodore was also adopted as an approximation to the Welsh name Tewdwr (see Tudor ). In North America, this surname has absorbed various other European cognates and their derivatives, e.g. Greek Theodorakis , Macedonian Todorovski, and Serbian Todorović (see Todorovic ).

variants.name: Tedder
meanings: English (Surrey): from the Middle English personal name Thedere, Teddere, which is either from the Old English personal name Thēodhere (from thēod ‘people’ + here ‘army’) or from the cognate ancient Germanic personal name Theudher, which seems to have been adopted by the Normans. Alternatively, perhaps it may be an occupational name from Middle English teddere ‘one who teds’, i.e. a person whose occupation was to spread mown grass for drying.

nameMeanings.name: Owain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Perhaps derived in the Roman period from the Latin name Eugenius ( see Eugene ); alternatively, possibly from an Old Celtic name meaning ‘born of Esos’. Esos (or Aesos) was a Celtic god known to have been the subject of a cult in ancient Gaul.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Owain Tudor Knight was born in 1400, in Anglesey, Wales, his father, Maredudd Tudur, was 36 and his mother, Margaret ferch Dafydd, was 30. He married Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France in 1429, in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 2 February 1461, in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.Carmarthen Castle, Carmarthen, Carmarthe: Carmarthen, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Owain Tudor Knight est né en 1400, à Anglesey, Galles, son père, Maredudd Tudur, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret ferch Dafydd, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France en 1429, à Cleveland, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 février 1461, à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Hereford, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Owain Tudor Knight 1400 in Anglesey, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Maredudd Tudur 36 und seine Mutter Margaret ferch Dafydd 30. Er hat 1429 in Cleveland, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Februar 1461 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Hereford, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owain Tudor Knight è nato il nel 1400 nel Anglesey, Galles, il suo padre, Maredudd Tudur, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret ferch Dafydd, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France nel 1429, nel Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 febbraio 1461, nel Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Hereford, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Owain Tudor Knightが1400年にウェールズアングレセイで生まれた時，父Maredudd Tudurは36歳，母Margaret ferch Dafyddは30歳であった。1429年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアクレベランドでCatherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1461年2月2日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアハーエフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Owain Tudor Knight(이)가 1400년 웨일스 앤글레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Maredudd Tudur(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret ferch Dafydd(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1429년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 클레벨랜드에서 Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1461년 2월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 허퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Owain Tudor Knight nasceu em 1400, em Anglesey, Gales, seu pai, Maredudd Tudur, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret ferch Dafydd, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France em 1429, em Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de fevereiro de 1461, em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Owain Tudor Knight родился в 1400 г. в местности англеси, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Maredudd Tudur было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret ferch Dafydd, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France в 1429 г. в местности кливеланд, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 февраля 1461 г. в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности хирефорд, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Owain Tudor Knight nació en 1400, en Isla Oscura, Gales, su papá, Maredudd Tudur, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret ferch Dafydd, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Catherine of Valois, Queen Consort of England, Princess of France en 1429, en Cleveland, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de febrero de 1461, en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Hereford, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
